creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
"incomplete type 'BIO_METHOD'"

Likely fixed in a later release, they've switchted to a different upstream for go openssl.

During BSDCan 2018 the intention to update OpenSSL in base to 1.1.x branch was documented.

Intention is to update OpenSSL in 12-STABLE to 1.1.1 when that is released. 

Poudriere log: https://keg.brnrd.eu/data/111amd64-default-openssl110/2018-08-17_12h10m13s/logs/errors/mongodb34-3.4.16.log
